principle: Write ALT tags as functional descriptions not SEO keywords — AI uses them to connect image meaning to surrounding text
explanation: X.seo|alt_semantic: ALT == semantic_bridge_between_image_and_text_for_AI; must_be: short + precise + neutral + functional; describe: what_is_shown + why_it_is_here + relation_to_section; NO:alt="photo" NO:alt="image" NO:marketing_phrases NO:keyword_stuffing eg: "alt='best_company_photo_services_2026'" >> "alt='credit_scoring_model_structure_diagram'"

principle: AI trusts thematically focused sites over large generic ones — consistent topic across all pages builds model confidence
explanation: X.seo|thematic_focus: model_trusts_project_logic NOT domain_size; one_consistent_topic_across_pages == expert_source; contradictory_or_scattered_topics == unreliable; three_level_selection: 1_trusted_project -> 2_relevant_page -> 3_citable_fragment; small_focused_site beats large_generic_site; NO:mixing_unrelated_topics NO:random_content_across_site eg: "site_about_finance+cooking+travel" >> "site_100%_about_personal_finance == model_sees_expert"

principle: Add FAQ section of 3-5 real questions to articles that get traffic but no AI citations — FAQ compensates for unstructured main text
explanation: X.seo|faq_experiment: article_with_traffic_but_no_AI_citations -> add_FAQ_3-5_questions; each_question == one_intent (what_is/how_works/why_happens/what_to_choose); each_answer == 2-3_sentences_self_contained; reindex_page; result: AI_starts_citing_FAQ_fragments_within_days; FAQ == clean_structure_that_compensates_for_free_form_article; NO:fake_questions NO:promotional_answers eg: "long_article_no_AI_pickup" >> "same_article + FAQ: Q1_definition_Q2_mechanism_Q3_criteria -> AI_cites_FAQ"

principle: Rewrite one messy paragraph into three sentences (statement + mechanism + consequence) and AI will start citing it specifically
explanation: X.seo|paragraph_rewrite: find_paragraph_with: mixed_explanation+example+conclusion; rewrite_as: sentence_1 == core_statement; sentence_2 == mechanism_or_cause; sentence_3 == consequence_or_result; new_paragraph == autonomous + structural + context_free; AI_starts_using_this_specific_fragment; NO:mixing_multiple_ideas NO:long_complex_paragraphs eg: "8_sentence_paragraph_mixing_definition_history_opinion_example" >> "SSL_encrypts_data_transfer._Browser_verifies_certificate_ownership._Users_see_padlock_confirming_security."
